categories.label: Video
categories.description: Video, image, and audio-visual generation or editing runtimes.

categories.label: World models
categories.description: Interactive worlds, prediction, navigation, and simulator-shaped systems.

categories.label: 3D & 4D
categories.description: Reconstruction, geometry, point clouds, scenes, and dynamic representations.

categories.label: Embodied
categories.description: VLA, vision-action, world-action, and robot-policy runtimes.

categories.label: Hosted API
categories.description: Provider-backed models that require credentials or a hosted endpoint.

recipes.name: AC3D
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry vendors the official AC3D inference runtime under worldfoundry/synthesis/visual_generation/ac3d/ac3d_runtime; WorldFoundry owns path resolution, command construction, output loading, and pipeline/catalog exposure.

recipes.name: AnimateDiff
recipes.summary: Verified against the official repo default RealisticVision scripts.animate demo; file SHA256, decoded pixel SHA256, and artifact size match exactly.

recipes.name: Astra
recipes.summary: In-tree Astra inference route is registered under worldfoundry/synthesis/visual_generation/kling/astra_runtime.

recipes.name: Being-H0.5
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry keeps the inference-only Being-H0.5 architecture and policy runtime directly under worldfoundry/synthesis/action_generation/being_h05.

recipes.name: CameraCtrl
recipes.summary: Runtime code is vendored in-tree; checkpoints remain external assets under the normal hfd/ckpt cache.

recipes.name: CogVideoX
recipes.summary: HF cardData reports Apache-2.0 for 2B and 'other' for several larger variants.

recipes.name: HunyuanVideo 1.5
recipes.summary: Added as a high-priority current open-weight video model. Native T2V and I2V infer-only `generate.py` paths are now ported in-tree and release-validation verified with local checkpoint assets.

recipes.name: HunyuanWorld-Mirror
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry exposes framework inference through the in-tree HunyuanMirrorPipeline and vendored inference-only WorldMirror model code.

recipes.name: HY-WorldPlay

recipes.name: Infinite-World

recipes.summary: Exact released action-centered Mixture-of-Transformers and official action-only diffusion loop execute in process.

recipes.name: GO-1

status.label: In Tree Checkpoint Runtime Static Verified

recipes.name: H-RDT
recipes.summary: The transformer, flow-matching sampler, DINOv2 plus SigLIP vision path, and optional T5 language path are in-tree.

recipes.name: HappyOyster
recipes.summary: HappyOyster API route is registered; API credentials/endpoint are runtime-gated.

recipes.summary: HMA official generator route is registered; checkpoints/robot assets are runtime-gated.

recipes.name: HunyuanWorld 1.0
recipes.summary: HunyuanWorld 1.0 official source route is registered; checkpoints and third-party assets are runtime-gated.

recipes.name: HY-Embodied
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry routes HY-Embodied through an in-tree official Transformers image-text runtime adapter.

recipes.name: Infinite VGGT
recipes.summary: In-tree StreamVGGT (Infinite VGGT) pipeline is registered for streaming 3D reconstruction.

recipes.summary: The A1-3B Qwen3-VL/expert graph, Cosmos wrapper, preprocessing, flow sampler, and normalization route are in tree.

status.label: In Tree Checkpoint Runtime Static Verified

recipes.name: LaST-R1
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry routes LaST-R1 through the in-tree official-policy runtime adapter.

recipes.name: Latent Action Pretraining
recipes.summary: LAPA latent action runtime is vendored in-tree; py_compile, from_pretrained, plan-only execution, and alias validation passed.

recipes.name: LDA-1B
recipes.summary: Qwen3-VL assembly, DINOv3-ViT compatibility model, MMDiT sampler, state packing, and action unnormalization are in-tree.

status.label: In Tree Checkpoint Runtime Static Verified

recipes.name: LeWorldModel
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry exposes an infer-only wrapper for the official LeWorldModel eval route under synthesis/visual_generation/world_model/le_wm.

recipes.name: LIBERO-Para
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry routes LIBERO-Para action evaluation through an in-tree official-policy runtime adapter.

recipes.name: LingBot-VA
recipes.summary: Local official source and LingBot-VA checkpoints are present; base transformer CUDA forward, posttrain checkpoint tensor probes, and libero-long server-init validation passed on an 80GB CUDA GPU. Full client rollout/action decoding remains…

status.label: In Tree Checkpoint Runtime Gpu Server Init Verified Rollout Pending

recipes.name: LingBot-VLA
recipes.summary: Official policy/model, feature transforms, robot mapping, and normalization assets are integrated directly in-tree.

status.label: In Tree In Process Checkpoint Runtime

recipes.name: LingBot-VLA 2.0
recipes.summary: Qwen3-VL/MoE policy inference, official batching, feature transforms, robot mappings, and normalization assets are integrated directly in-tree.

status.label: In Tree In Process Checkpoint Runtime

recipes.name: Mem-0
recipes.summary: The in-tree runtime contains the episodic memory bank, Qwen feature path, classifier, and flow-matching action decoder.

recipes.name: MineWorld
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry registers an in-tree runtime manifest pipeline for the vendored MineWorld source.

recipes.name: MosaicMem
recipes.summary: MosaicMem source route is registered for memory-plan artifacts; generator assets remain runtime-gated.

recipes.name: MotionBricks
recipes.summary: MotionBricks official source route is registered; motion/robot assets are runtime-gated.

recipes.name: MoVerse
recipes.summary: The headless inference closure is integrated in-tree with local-only checkpoint resolution and shared WorldFoundry GeoCalib, DA3, SHARP, Wan, and TAEHV components.

recipes.name: Multi-task DiT Policy
recipes.summary: No separate official repository was identified; use the concrete LeRobot multi_task_dit policy as reference source.

recipes.name: Navigation World Models
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry registers an in-tree runtime manifest pipeline for the vendored NWM source.

recipes.name: Oasis 500M
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry registers an in-tree runtime manifest pipeline for the vendored Open-Oasis source.

recipes.name: OmniForcing
recipes.summary: OmniForcing official source route is registered; checkpoints/runtime assets are runtime-gated.

recipes.name: OpenPIE 0.6
recipes.summary: OpenPIE 0.6 is tracked as its own model entry, separate from OpenPI pi0/pi0.5.

recipes.name: pi0
recipes.summary: Concrete pi0 algorithm entry backed by Physical Intelligence openpi. The generic openpi runtime record remains as shared runtime infrastructure.

recipes.name: PI0 (WorldFoundry native)
recipes.summary: WorldFoundry-native PI0 is routed through the same in-tree OpenPI runtime used by the concrete pi0 entry.

recipes.name: pi0-FAST
recipes.summary: Concrete pi0-FAST algorithm entry backed by Physical Intelligence openpi.

recipes.name: pi0.5
recipes.summary: Concrete pi0.5 algorithm entry backed by Physical Intelligence openpi. Do not route this through LeRobot policy-zoo.

recipes.name: Pi3
recipes.summary: In-tree Pi3 point-cloud navigation pipeline is registered for reconstruction and trajectory rendering.

recipes.name: PointWorld
recipes.summary: PointWorld official source route is registered; checkpoint/point-cloud assets are runtime-gated.

recipes.name: RDT-1B
recipes.summary: The native 128D unified action model, two-frame three-camera preprocessing, and DPM inference are in tree.

recipes.name: Real-Time Chunking
recipes.summary: RTC is an inference-time action-chunking algorithm used by flow VLA policies rather than a standalone checkpoint family.

recipes.name: RISE
recipes.summary: The official deployment transform, three-camera mapping, Pi0.5 action architecture, normalization, and 50x14 output contract execute in process.

recipes.name: RT-1
recipes.summary: Official checkpoint and TensorFlow rollout command must be validated before integrated status.

recipes.name: Sana
recipes.summary: Official Sana source, configs, ControlNet runner, Sprint runner, and video runner are vendored under worldfoundry.base_models.diffusion_model.image.sana.

recipes.name: ShotStream
recipes.summary: ShotStream official inference route is registered; checkpoint/streaming assets are runtime-gated.

recipes.name: SimWorld
recipes.summary: SimWorld route is registered; simulator server/assets are runtime-gated.

recipes.name: SmolVLA
recipes.summary: The in-tree runtime preserves the official flow-matching architecture, preprocessing, and strict checkpoint structure.

recipes.name: Spirit-VLA v1.5
recipes.summary: Native inference architecture and preprocessing are included in tree.

recipes.name: StarWM

recipes.summary: Concrete algorithm entry sourced from the official TD-MPC repository, not from the generic LeRobot policy zoo.
